patch_rows.required_change: Make complete-knowledge coverage, source-family routing, actual-call evidence and stop-condition validation executable rather than descriptive.
Require full compound-option atom coverage, common-atom subtraction, complete direction matrix and all six pairwise rows before TOP1/TOP2 release.
Propagate capability ceilings so tendency, opportunity and time permission cannot be upgraded to actual occurrence or formal endpoint.
Materialize candidate-year facts before option projection and enforce symmetric candidate-year fields and direct-time-counterevidence checks.
Separate person entry, person-taiji origin, relative topic palace, native palace, actor actions, caregiver identity and stage chronology.
Require industry, product/service, unique action, service object, income form, employment/self-employment identity, continuity and region-era magnitude evidence.
Freeze user-provided Ziwei and Bazi charts independently; retain legal Zi-hour/day-change variants and prohibit result-based selection or cross-track overwrite.
Require immutable machine-valid local seals for both tracks and prevent copied parent chains or default positive gain from agreement.
Add candidate source-patch manifest, full S00-S19 baseline materialization, hash/binding rebuild, installation receipt, answer-isolated same-set retest and promote/reject state transitions.

candidate_patch_requirements: No case IDs, answer vectors, answer letters, option-specific winner text or copied question phrases
Every change has responsible library IDs, parent clauses, applicability conditions, limitations, counterexamples and capability ceiling
Rebuild S00 locator/index when any S01-S19 text changes
Rebuild S19 active binding table with full-file SHA256 and byte sizes
Create immutable prior baseline and complete candidate baseline
Install candidate baseline before fresh-context same-set retest
